_comment: v4.24.5 — live holdout: unedited Kazakh queries from the 2026-05-01 live-dialog battery (covered identity / science / history / culture / arithmetic / multi-turn / unknown-handling / temporal-scope / compositional-possessive / closed-class / honest-fallback). Each case asserts substring presence (any-of-list passes) and/or absence (none-of-list passes) — template-variant-tolerant. UNLIKE the curated parse-disambiguation eval (curated/regression-style, hand-tuned to lock specific behaviour), this set is a *blind* eval: the queries were not edited after capture, no template tuning happened to make any specific case pass. Pass rate is the headline metric; per-category breakdown surfaces where the system is still weak. Future captures (live_holdout_YYYYMMDD.json) extend coverage; never edit a captured set after it lands.

cases.note: Bare identity question. v4.x intro answer mentions name, full name, kind.
Creator-attribution. Author name should appear.
Implementation aspect (v4.12.0). Mentions Rust + crate stack.
Capabilities aspect. Long structured answer.
Birthdate aspect (v4.17.5 added дүниеге кел verb-form variant).
Curated biology fact for жасуша.
Curated biology fact for фотосинтез.
Curated chemistry fact. Phrasing-sensitive — alternative «Атомның құрамында не бар?» fails (separate carry-forward).
Curated chemistry fact for су.
Curated geo fact (v4.17.5 rich IsA via geo_kz_115).
Curated geo fact for Алматы.

Pure arithmetic. Determinstic calculator.
Pure arithmetic.
Pure arithmetic.
v4.23.0 routes to unknown.temporal_no_data.
v4.23.0 temporal-scope detector.
v4.23.0 temporal-scope detector.
v4.23.0 temporal-scope detector — былтыр + Қазақстан.

v4.23.5 routes to unknown.compositional_function.with_fact. The bare structural fact «Ядро жасуша құрамына кіреді» is correctly surfaced AS the structural fact and wrapped with functional-gap hedge — so the structural-fact substring naturally appears in the response and is NOT a regression signal.
v4.23.5 compositional-function detector.
v4.23.5 — bare variant (no митохондрия fact in world_core).
v4.22.5 — `керек` added to NOT_A_TOPIC. Pre-fix returned proverb «Жетілсең де, жетсең де, Керек күні бір бар-ау».
v4.22.5 — same `керек` filter; Latin name also unrecognized.
v4.22.5 — `ірі` + `атап` added to NOT_A_TOPIC. Pre-fix returned proverb on атап.
v4.17.5 willingness routing — preserves `керек` semantics in this context (request, not topic).
v4.22.5 anti-regression — temporal `бүгін` filtered as topic, but acknowledgment template still fires for the statement.

Latin technical term outside v4.11.5 closed list. Honest fallback. v4.26.5 added «дегеніміз» as topic-marker keyword, which makes the extractor pick «entanglement» as topic; since it's not in world_core, the fallback is now «Бәлкім, Entanglement туралы айтасыз ба» rather than blanket «Түсінбедім» — both are honest-no-data responses; updated to accept either.
Non-Kazakh proper name outside world_core. Soft fallback.
Name capture into session. v4.18.0 added respectful Дәке form for follow-up turns; first turn echoes literal name.
Age capture into session.
